ddls:
CREATE TABLE "sizes" (
  "size_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each size */,
  "size_name" TEXT /* Name of the size (e.g., S, M, L, XL, 2XL) */,
  "size_type" TEXT /* Type of size (e.g., Standard, Custom) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the size */,
  "size_code" TEXT /* Unique code for the size */,
  "international_size" TEXT /* International equivalent of the size */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender (e.g., Men, Women, Unisex) */,
  "age_group" TEXT /* Age group (e.g., Adult, Child, Infant) */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the size is active and available for use */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("size_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "measurement_types" (
  "measurement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each measurement type */,
  "measurement_name" TEXT /* Name of the measurement (e.g., Bust, Shoulder Width, Sleeve Length) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the measurement */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement (e.g., inches, centimeters) */,
  "is_required" INTEGER /* Indicates if the measurement is required for the size chart */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("measurement_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "size_measurements" (
  "measurement_id" INTEGER /* ID of the measurement type */,
  "size_id" INTEGER /* ID of the size */,
  "measurement_value" REAL /* Value of the measurement */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement */,
  "tolerance" REAL /* Acceptable tolerance range for the measurement */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("measurement_id", "size_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product */,
  "product_name" TEXT /* Name of the product */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the product (e.g., Shirts, Dresses, Pants) */,
  "brand" TEXT /* Brand of the product */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the product */,
  "product_code" TEXT /* Unique code for the product */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the product */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the product is active and available for sale */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the product was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date when the product was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_brand FOREIGN KEY ("brand") REFERENCES brands ("brand_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_category FOREIGN KEY ("category") REFERENCES categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "product_sizes" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product */,
  "size_id" INTEGER /* ID of the size */,
  "is_default" INTEGER /* Indicates if the size is the default size for the product */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the size was added to the product */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date when the size was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id", "size_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "product_measurements" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product */,
  "size_id" INTEGER /* ID of the size */,
  "measurement_id" INTEGER /* ID of the measurement type */,
  "measurement_value" REAL /* Value of the measurement */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement */,
  "tolerance" REAL /* Acceptable tolerance range for the measurement */,
  "is_custom" INTEGER /* Indicates if the measurement is custom for the product */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id", "size_id", "measurement_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category (e.g., Shirts, Dresses, Pants) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the category is active and available for use */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the category was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date when the category was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "brands" (
  "brand_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each brand */,
  "brand_name" TEXT /* Name of the brand */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the brand */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of origin for the brand */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the brand is active and available for use */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the brand was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date when the brand was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("brand_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inventory" (
  "inventory_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each inventory record */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product */,
  "size_id" INTEGER /* ID of the size */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product in stock */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the inventory was last updated */,
  "reorder_level" INTEGER /* Inventory level at which a reorder should be initiated */,
  "last_reorder_date" TEXT /* Date of the last reorder */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the inventory record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date when the inventory record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("inventory_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_id") REFERENCES sizes ("size_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "quality_control" (
  "qc_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each quality control check */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product */,
  "size_id" INTEGER /* ID of the size */,
  "check_date" TEXT /* Date when the quality check was performed */,
  "result" TEXT /* Result of the quality check (e.g., Pass, Fail) */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Notes or comments about the quality check */,
  "inspector_id" INTEGER /* ID of the inspector who performed the quality check */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the quality check was recorded */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date when the quality check record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("qc_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_quality_control_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_id") REFERENCES sizes ("size_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_quality_control_inspector_id FOREIGN KEY ("inspector_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_quality_control_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., designer, production, quality control, admin) */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date when the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the system */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the system was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit, delete) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location from which the access was made */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the access was logged */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "order_details" (
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product ordered */,
  "size_id" INTEGER /* ID of the size ordered */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product ordered */,
  "order_date" TEXT /* Date when the order was placed */,
  "ship_date" TEXT /* Date when the order was shipped */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer who placed the order */,
  "shipping_address" TEXT /* Shipping address for the order */,
  "billing_address" TEXT /* Billing address for the order */,
  "order_total" REAL /* Total amount of the order */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the order was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date when the order was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_details_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_id") REFERENCES sizes ("size_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_details_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "order_status" (
  "status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each status update */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* ID of the order */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the order (e.g., Pending, Shipped, Delivered) */,
  "update_date" TEXT /* Date when the status was last updated */,
  "status_code" TEXT /* Unique code for the status update */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the status update was recorded */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date when the status update was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("status_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_status_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES order_details ("order_id")
)
